emails.subject: EOL stats for Q4 2000
emails.body: EOL stats for Q4 2000 Eric, Attached are the details behind the stats as listed below regarding 3rd Party transactions on EOL: Tom/Elsa Physical Financial Total Greg/Metz Physical Financial Total Grand Total October 2000 751 0 751 84 879 963 1,714 November 2000 805 4 809 102 1,276 1,378 2,187 December 2000 863 9 872 30 1,050 1,080 1,952 Grand Totals 2,419 13 2,432 216 3,205 3,421 5,853 O'Neal
